<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="_hjH4lkphomX2s8lrl3r" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-824" dy="-197" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontColor=#333333;" value="Agent Orchestration & Inter-Agent Handoff System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="400" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agents_container" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;swimlaneLine=0;rounded=1;arcSize=8;" value="Agents" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="240" x="20" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agent_research" parent="agents_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=0;fontSize=11;" value="Research Agent

(capability declarations)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="20" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dispatcher" parent="orch_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=0;" value="Task Dispatcher

If the directory scan misses something, the memory injection catches it." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="380" x="20" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Belt-and-suspenders: memory notes back up queue directory scans.
If the directory scan misses something, the memory injection catches it.
